items.title: Notice of Public Hearing - Abating hazardous vegetation 2026
items.summary: placing the cost of abating hazardous vegetation on the property tax assessment roll. Assessments and other supporting documentation are on file and available for public review in the Community Development Department, 70 N. First Street, Campbell, California.

items.title: Notice of Public Hearing - SB 450 Interim Ordinance Single Family Zone Districts
items.summary: adoption of an interim ordinance superseding a prior interim ordinance implementing Senate Bill (SB) 450 (2024), as modified by Assembly Bill (AB) 1061 (2025), to revise historic resource eligibility provisions applicable to two-unit developments and urban lot splits, simplify subdivision regulations, and eliminate design standards for certain Single-Family Residential Zoning Districts (Ordinance; 4/5 roll call vote).

items.title: Notice of Public Hearing - SB 480 Chapman Drive
items.summary: a request for City Council initiation of a General Plan Amendment to change the land use designation of property with an existing single family residence located at 480 Chapman Drive from “Neighborhood Commercial” to “Low Density Residential (<4.5 units per gross acre)”. The applicant also seeks City Council consideration of a reduction in application fees for the required amendments to the General Plan Land Use Map, Zoning Map, and Form-Based Zone Map. The application under consideration includes a mandatory Preliminary Application.

items.title: Notice of Public Hearing - SB 79 extension
items.summary: adoption of an Interim Ordinance to Extend Interim Ordinance No. 26-2350 which established Urgency Measures in response to SB 79, the Abundant and Affordable Homes Near Transit Act of 2025 (File No. PLN-2025-50)

items.title: Notice of Public Hearing Budget fy2027
items.summary: introduction of the City Operating/Capital Budget. The City Council will consider final adoption of the FY 2026 Budget and GANN Limit for Fiscal Year (FY) 2026 at the Tuesday, June 16, 2026 City Council Meeting.

items.title: Notice of Public Hearing - SB 1123 6.2.26
items.summary: extending an Interim Ordinance Reestablishing the Urgency Measures of Interim Ordinance No. 2334.

items.title: 2027-2031 Capital Improvement Plan (CIP) (Resolution/Roll Call Vote)
items.summary: consider the City of Campbell 2027-2031 Capital Improvement Plan (CIP) for citywide projects for consistency with the Campbell 2040 General Plan.

items.title: Notice of Public Hearing - SB 1123 5.19.26
items.summary: extending an Interim Ordinance Reestablishing the Urgency Measures of Interim Ordinance No. 2334.

items.title: Notice of Public Hearing - AB 2561 Vacancy Reporting
items.summary: receiving the informational report on City of Campbell Vacancies, and Recruitment and Retention Efforts Pursuant to Government Code Section 3502.3.

items.title: Campbell Technology Park Project DEIR Public Hearing
items.summary: receive comments from the public on the focused Draft Environmental Impact Report (DEIR) prepared for the proposed Campbell Technology Park Project, on property located at 635, 655, 675, and 695 Campbell Technology Parkway. The proposed project is a 290-unit residential development consisting of 27 two-story single-family detached homes, 149 three-story townhome-style condominium units across 28 buildings, and 114 four-story townhome-style condominium units across 15 buildings. The project would demolish four existing on-site structures totaling approximately 280,864 square-feet and redevelop the site with residential uses and associated improvements, including utility and infrastructure upgrades, landscaping, construction of a new stormwater drainage system, and off-site improvements.

items.title: 278 E Campbell Avenue – Conditional Use Permit (Resolution/Roll Call Vote)
items.summary: consider the application of Fatih Ulas to allow the on-site sale of beer and wine in association with a quick service restaurant (dba Sultan's Kebab) on property located at 278 E Campbell Avenue. The application under consideration includes a Conditional Use Permit.
